sentence: 这件陶器是汉代出土的文物。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn táoqì shì Hàndài chūtǔ de wénwù.
english: This piece of pottery is a cultural relic unearthed from the Han dynasty.

sentence: 人生无常，要珍惜眼前的人。
pinyin: Rénshēng wúcháng, yào zhēnxī yǎnqián de rén.
english: Life is impermanent, so cherish the people around you.

sentence: 他快步走进会议室，落座后马上开始发言。
pinyin: Tā kuàibù zǒu jìn huìyìshì, luòzuò hòu mǎshàng kāishǐ fāyán.
english: He strode quickly into the meeting room and started speaking as soon as he sat down.

sentence: 这种寄生虫会通过食物传染给人类。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng jìshēngchóng huì tōngguò shíwù chuánrǎn gěi rénlèi.
english: This type of parasite can be transmitted to humans through food.

meaning: 1. on the same level; 2. ranking equally
sentence: 我们是同级同学，关系一直很好。
pinyin: Wǒmen shì tóngjí tóngxué, guānxi yīzhí hěn hǎo.
english: We are classmates in the same grade and have always gotten along well.
